title: Colorful Anvils
description: Lightweight Minecraft plugin for colored item names in anvils using MiniMessage formatting !
body:
# **Colorful Anvils**

[![GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/gh-constant/ColorfulAnvils)
[![Sponsor](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/ghsponsors-singular_vector.svg)](https://github.com/sponsors/gh-constant)

## тЬи **About the Project**

I built this plugin after realizing there wasnтАЩt a version that supported the latest updates тАФ and since I needed it for my SMP, I decided to make one myself.

If you enjoy it and want to support future updates,
consider leaving a token of appreciation тАФ it helps the crystal glow brighter. ЁЯТО

## ЁЯМИ **Features**

* ЁЯОи **Colored Item Names** тАФ Use **MiniMessage** formatting directly in anvils.
* ЁЯМЕ **Gradient Support** тАФ Create stunning, glowing color transitions.
* тЪЩя╕П **Adventure API Integration** тАФ Powered by MinecraftтАЩs modern text engine.
* ЁЯз░ **Effortless to Use** тАФ Type your format in anvils тАФ *no commands required*.
* ЁЯк╢ **Lightweight & Compatible** тАФ Seamlessly works with all modern Paper-based servers.

## ЁЯзк **Example**

```text
<gradient:#6a0dad:#d8b4ff><bold>Amethyst Aegis</bold></gradient>
```

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/272950aa60a9e4b8f1b97b97be3c9838d37e838d.png)

## тЪЩя╕П **Installation**

[![Paper](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/paper_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-anvils/versions?l=paper)
[![Purpur](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/purpur_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-anvils/versions?l=purpur)
[![Bukkit](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/bukkit_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-anvils/versions?l=bukkit)
[![Spigot](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/spigot_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-anvils/versions?l=spigot)

1. ЁЯУе Download the `.jar` file
2. ЁЯУВ Drop it into your `plugins/` folder
3. ЁЯФБ Restart your server
4. тЬи Open an anvil and start crafting colorful item names!

ЁЯТб *If your sword shimmers with amethyst hues тАФ itтАЩs working perfectly.*

## ЁЯзн **Compatibility**

* **Minecraft:** 1.21+
* **Servers:** Paper, Spigot, Purpur
* **Java:** 17+

## ЁЯкД **Commands**

| Command                  | Description                         |
| ------------------------ | ----------------------------------- |
| `/amethystanvils`        | Show plugin info and examples       |
| `/amethystanvils reload` | Reload configuration *(admin only)* |
